description: Call to Arms Patch 10 (21 September 2021) — New Artifacts Added, Hideout Changes, Castle Outpost Changes, Faction Warfare Changes, Nametag Changes, New Marketplace Categories, Other Changes, Combat Balance Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: Hideout Changes

subsections.heading: Entering Hideouts now requires a channel

items.text: If a player has set "Home" in a Hideout, they can still instantly enter it without a channel
The protection bubble granted when leaving a Hideout no longer breaks with open-world interactions, making it possible to safely channel back into a Hideout without losing the bubble

Additionally, players with their Home set in a Hideout within the Roads of Avalon will no longer lose their Home setting when using the Travel Planner and then traveling through a Realmgate in a Royal City

sections.heading: Castle Outpost Changes

items.text: Removed doors of Castle Outposts to make them easier to conquer by smaller groups and encourage more guerilla warfare
Warning messages when Castle Outposts are under attack now appear only in the guild chat, to reduce onscreen messages for guild members
Time until next guard wave spawns: 120 seconds → 60 seconds

stats.name: Time until next guard wave spawns

sections.searchable_text: Castle Outpost Changes Removed doors of Castle Outposts to make them easier to conquer by smaller groups and encourage more guerilla warfare Warning messages when Castle Outposts are under attack now appear only in the guild chat, to reduce onscreen messages for guild members Time until next guard wave spawns: 120 seconds → 60 seconds

sections.heading: Faction Warfare Changes

items.text: Enlisting with a Faction with low recruitment rates now has less of a penalty for players of lower rank
Faction Warfare kills in red zones are now worth up to three times as many Faction Points than knockouts in yellow zones
Areas previously owned by a Faction other than Caerleon are now worth more Faction Points after a Bandit Assault begins

sections.searchable_text: Faction Warfare Changes Enlisting with a Faction with low recruitment rates now has less of a penalty for players of lower rank Faction Warfare kills in red zones are now worth up to three times as many Faction Points than knockouts in yellow zones Areas previously owned by a Faction other than Caerleon are now worth more Faction Points after a Bandit Assault begins

sections.heading: Nametag Changes

items.text: Added option to display guild names of other players without displaying player names
For Faction-flagged players, other players flagged to the same Faction now appear as allies

sections.searchable_text: Nametag Changes Added option to display guild names of other players without displaying player names For Faction-flagged players, other players flagged to the same Faction now appear as allies

sections.heading: New Marketplace Categories

items.text: Added "Tomes" category for tradable Tomes of Insight
Added new "Mount" subcategories, which also contain all mounts that can equip skins from the same Mount Skin category

sections.searchable_text: New Marketplace Categories Added "Tomes" category for tradable Tomes of Insight Added new "Mount" subcategories, which also contain all mounts that can equip skins from the same Mount Skin category Swiftclaw Direbear Direboar Direwolf Stag/Moose Mule Swamp Dragon

sections.heading: Other Changes

items.text: Level 6 Crystal League Tokens (5v5 and 20v20) are now non-tradable
A popup message now displays when the Usage Fee of a player-owned crafting station was recently changed
When both players in a Corrupted Dungeon are knocked down, the get-up time is greatly reduced
Reworked login and character creation / selection screens: players can now choose "Auto-Login", "Remember Me", or neither
Mobile players can now begin playing with guest accounts, with the following conditions

subitems.text: No cross-play: guest accounts are bound to a device ID
No shop access: guest accounts cannot make purchases in the ingame store

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes

subsections.heading: Bows

items.text: Enchanted Quiver (Regular Bow)

subsections.searchable_text: Bows Enchanted Quiver (Regular Bow) Attack Damage Increase per Stack: 35% → 30% Attack Speed Increase per Stack: 15% → 13% Max Attack Buff Stack: 6 → 7 Attack Buff Duration: 5s → 2.5s

subsections.heading: Cursed Staffs

items.text: Dark Matter (all Cursed Staffs)

subsections.searchable_text: Cursed Staffs Dark Matter (all Cursed Staffs) Damage vs Players: 78 → 73

subsections.heading: Holy Staffs

items.text: Divine Intervention (Hallowfall)

subitems.text: Cooldown Reduction when hitting at least one ally: 20% → 35%

stats.name: Cooldown Reduction when hitting at least one ally

subsections.searchable_text: Holy Staffs Divine Intervention (Hallowfall) Cooldown: 25s → 30s Cooldown Reduction when hitting at least one ally: 20% → 35%

subsections.heading: Nature Staffs

items.text: Cleanse Heal (all Nature Staffs)
Ruthless Nature (Blight Staff)

subitems.text: Healing Output is now lower when used alone and higher when an ally is affected

subsections.searchable_text: Nature Staffs Cleanse Heal (all Nature Staffs) Cooldown: 15s → 18s Ruthless Nature (Blight Staff) No longer slows enemies Healing Output is now lower when used alone and higher when an ally is affected

items.text: Fling (Glaive)
Mighty Blow (Broadsword)

subsections.heading: Shoes

items.text: Royal March (Royal Boots)

subsections.searchable_text: Shoes Royal March (Royal Boots) Movement Speed Increase per Stack: 9% → 8%

subsections.heading: Battle Mounts

items.text: Arrow Volley (Phalanx Beetle)

subitems.text: Fix: The debuff can now be cleansed as intended

items.text: Omnibarrage (Phalanx Beetle)

subitems.text: Consumes all Arrow Rain stacks in a 18m radius
The strength of the ability now depends on the stacks consumed at cast start (independent of the amount of stacks on individual enemies)
The channel can now be canceled by the caster
Fix: Slow effect now stays active for the intended/whole duration on targets inside the effect area

subsections.searchable_text: Battle Mounts Arrow Volley (Phalanx Beetle) Cooldown 4s → 2s Fix: The debuff can now be cleansed as intended Omnibarrage (Phalanx Beetle) Consumes all Arrow Rain stacks in a 18m radius The strength of the ability now depends on the stacks consumed at cast start (independent of the amount of stacks on individual enemies) The channel can now be canceled by the caster Fix: Slow effect now stays active for the intended/whole duration on targets inside the effect area

sections.heading: Fixes

items.text: Spell fixes

subitems.text: Soul Link now gives the intended 8 seconds to connect (previously 1 second)
The second hit of Hamstring (Swords) can no longer be executed if the Heroic Charge runs out during the activation window, as intended
Like all other dash abilities, Fearless Rush (Elite Lymhurst Boar) now only affects players below 150% of max carry weight
The AoE indication area of Spinning Blades (Dual Swords) is now correctly displayed for the caster to better communicate the minimum distance
Improved hit detection of second hit of Devastating Strike (Black Hands) to make it more reliable, even with high ping
Fixed an issue where Hoarfrost (Frost Staffs) would not deal AoE damage to surrounding targets if the main target died
Fixed an issue where Everlasting Spirit (Cleric Robe) triggered too frequently, especially after purge

items.text: Removed option to /suicide after being knocked down by mobs in Corrupted Dungeons, as intended
Fixed an issue where players could get stuck in spawning loot chests in Hellgates and Expeditions
Fixed an issue where Faction-flagged players could become stuck in dungeons in overcrowded zones when respawning
Fixed an issue where watering can was not displayed when watering plants
Fixed an issue where some tradable Crystal League tokens were not visible / tradable on the Marketplace
Fixed an issue where large Tier 8 fiber nodes did not display enchantment levels in the Steppe biome
Fixed a rare case where healing debuffs did not apply correctly upon entering a zone
Fixed an issue where scheduling a defense payout more than 15 minutes after the previously scheduled time would create an endless loop
Resolved an issue that prevented Elite Faction Mounts and the non-Elite Caerleon Faction Mount from ever being higher than normal quality
Additional graphical, audio, animation, terrain, UI, and localization fixes
